title: NCEM Drop Agar (TM-014)
steps: Place 5 µL sample on surface of agar square. Immediately float carbon coated formvar filmed grid face down on the droplet and leave until the droplet diffuses into the agar.
Stain nano-W Contributed by users Catalog ##2018-5ML 00:01:00
Make 2 Mass / % volume Agarose Contributed by users Catalog #A5304 in TC Water. Microwave to dissolve, pour into 3 mL of the solution into 5 mL petri dishes and place in fridge to solidify.
Cut 1 x1 cm squares out of agar with scalpel, lift out onto filter paper
creator: sandra.crameri
